title: Meetings: botless transcription and AI notes
summary: New Meetings surface: record a meeting without a bot — your mic plus (on desktop) system audio — with live Me/Them transcription that runs on-device by default (NVIDIA Parakeet v2 or Whisper, swappable in Settings), then merge your rough bullets with the transcript into AI-enhanced notes. Includes a meetings list + detail view, engine picker with model downloads, and privacy-first defaults: audio is never stored unless you opt in.
